flow_metadata.description: Process webhook notifications from connectors. Translates connector events into standardized responses for asynchronous payment state updates.
Authorize a payment amount on a payment method. This reserves funds without capturing them, essential for verifying availability before finalizing.
Retrieve current payment status from the payment processor. Enables synchronization between your system and payment processors for accurate state tracking.
Cancel an authorized payment before capture. Releases held funds back to customer, typically used when orders are cancelled or abandoned.
Reverse a captured payment before settlement. Recovers funds after capture but before bank settlement, used for corrections or cancellations.
Finalize an authorized payment transaction. Transfers reserved funds from customer to merchant account, completing the payment lifecycle.
Initialize an order in the payment processor system. Sets up payment context before customer enters card details for improved authorization rates.
Initiate a refund to customer's payment method. Returns funds for returns, cancellations, or service adjustments after original payment.
Increase authorized amount if still in authorized state. Allows adding charges to existing authorization for hospitality, tips, or incremental services.
Validate redirect-based payment responses. Confirms authenticity of redirect-based payment completions to prevent fraud and tampering.
Setup a recurring payment instruction for future payments/ debits. This could be for SaaS subscriptions, monthly bill payments, insurance payments and similar use cases.
Charge using an existing stored recurring payment instruction. Processes repeat payments for subscriptions or recurring billing without collecting payment details.
Cancel an existing recurring payment mandate. Stops future automatic charges on customer's stored consent for subscription cancellations.
Retrieve refund status from the payment processor. Tracks refund progress through processor settlement for accurate customer communication.
Upload evidence to dispute customer chargeback. Provides documentation like receipts and delivery proof to contest fraudulent transaction claims.
Retrieve dispute status and evidence submission state. Tracks dispute progress through bank review process for informed decision-making.
Submit defense with reason code for dispute. Presents formal argument against customer's chargeback claim with supporting documentation.
Concede dispute and accepts chargeback loss. Acknowledges liability and stops dispute defense process when evidence is insufficient.
Tokenize payment method for secure storage. Replaces raw card details with secure token for one-click payments and recurring billing.
Create customer record in the payment processor system. Stores customer details for future payment operations without re-sending personal information.
Generate short-lived connector authentication token. Provides secure credentials for connector API access without storing secrets client-side.
Create session token for payment processing. Maintains session state across multiple payment operations for improved security and tracking.
Initialize wallet payment sessions for Apple Pay, Google Pay, etc. Sets up secure context for tokenized wallet payments with device verification.
Initiate 3DS flow before payment authorization. Collects device data and prepares authentication context for frictionless or challenge-based verification.
Execute 3DS challenge or frictionless verification. Authenticates customer via bank challenge or behind-the-scenes verification for fraud prevention.
Validate authentication results with the issuing bank. Processes bank's authentication decision to determine if payment can proceed.

comments.refunds_response: Content if the event is for a refund synchronization.
comments.incomplete_transformation: Content if the payment event transformation is incomplete and requires psync call.
comments.payments_response: Content if the event is for a payment synchronization.
comments.disputes_response: Content if the event is for a dispute synchronization.

comments.capture_before: Unix timestamp before which capture must occur
comments.extended_authorization_last_applied_at: Unix timestamp of when extended authentication was last applied

comments.form: Data for constructing an HTML form for redirection.

comments.session_token: JSON serialized session token for wallet payments (Apple Pay, Google Pay)
